raw_cv_text:
Zainab Verstraeten
+44 7911 523847 | Email: zainab.verstraeten@gmail.com | LinkedIn: zainab-verstraeten | GitHub: ZainabVerstraeten | https://zainab-
verstraeten.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | MSc Computer Science 2019-2020
Achieved Distinction in thesis project on distributed systems optimization, improving cache efficiency by 34%
Led a team of 4 students in designing a containerized microservices architecture workshop attended by 120+ participants
University of Amsterdam | BSc Computer Science 2015-2019
Graduated with Honors (GPA 3.8/4.0), specializing in systems programming and algorithms
Ranked top 5% in Data Structures course, mentored 8 junior students in advanced algorithm design
EXPERIENCE
Cloudflare | Software Engineer II 2022-Present
Architected and deployed a real-time DNS query analytics pipeline processing 2.3 million requests/second, reducing
query latency by 28% for enterprise customers
Led migration of legacy rate-limiting service from Python to Rust, decreasing memory footprint by 61% and improving
throughput by 4.2x
Mentored 3 junior engineers on edge computing best practices, resulting in 2 successful production deployments and
100% code review approval rate
Notion | Mid-Level Software Engineer 2021-2022
Optimized database query performance for collaborative editing features, reducing P99 latency from 850ms to 120ms and
improving user retention by 15%
Implemented real-time synchronization protocol for offline-first functionality, enabling 40,000+ concurrent users with
<200ms sync latency
Refactored permission system using Redis caching, cutting database load by 52% and saving $47,000 annually in
infrastructure costs
Shopify | Junior Software Engineer 2020-2021
Developed payment reconciliation system processing $89M+ in transactions monthly with 99.98% accuracy, eliminating
200+ manual reconciliation hours/month
Enhanced checkout page performance by optimizing React components and implementing code splitting, increasing
conversion rate by 8.3%
Built comprehensive monitoring dashboard using Datadog and custom metrics, reducing incident detection time by 65%
PROJECTS
StreamSync | Rust, WebSocket, Redis, PostgreSQL 2023-Present
Engineered a high-throughput streaming data synchronization library supporting 50,000+ messages/second with sub-
100ms latency across distributed systems
Achieved 94% test coverage with comprehensive benchmarking suite, resulting in 3 open-source contributions and
1,200+ GitHub stars
GraphQL Query Optimizer | TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, Jest 2022-2023
Developed an intelligent query optimizer reducing API response times by 46% through automated batch request detection
and N+1 query prevention
Created educational documentation attracting 8,000+ developers, with 350+ upvotes on Hacker News and featured in 5
tech newsletters
DecentralAuth | Go, Ethereum, Solidity, Docker 2021-2022
Built decentralized authentication middleware using smart contracts, processing 15,000+ authentications weekly with zero
security incidents
Published peer-reviewed whitepaper and secured speaking slot at 2 blockchain conferences, reaching 5,000+ audience
members
CloudMonitor CLI | Python, AWS SDK, Click, PostgreSQL 2020-2021
Created open-source CLI tool for AWS resource monitoring, automating infrastructure audits for 2,000+ users and saving
1,500+ engineering hours quarterly
Achieved 12,000+ downloads on PyPI with 4.8/5.0 star rating and active community of 45+ contributors
EXTRACURRICULAR
European Developer Conference (EuroDev) | Conference Speaker & Workshop Facilitator 2022-Present
Delivered 2 keynote talks on 'Scaling Distributed Systems at Edge' reaching 3,200+ engineers from 45 countries
Facilitated hands-on workshop on performance optimization techniques, achieving 9.2/10 participant satisfaction score
with 95% attendance rate
Open Source Collective (Apache Foundation Member) | Core Contributor & Maintainer 2021-Present
Maintain 3 open-source projects with 18,000+ combined GitHub stars, reviewing 200+ pull requests annually and
growing contributor base by 140%
Mentor 5 junior developers transitioning to open-source contributions, with 100% of mentees successfully maintaining
their own projects
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Rust, Go, TypeScript, Python, Java, SQL, Solidity
Technologies – PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, GraphQL, React, Node.js, WebSocket, Apache Kafka, Docker,
Kubernetes, AWS, Datadog
Tools – Git, GitHub, GitLab, VS Code, IntelliJ IDEA, Jira, Figma, Jenkins, Terraform, Linux, macOS
